description: CompositionGreen round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the chestFitRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryThe perfect basic T-shirt to create flawless layering from spykar. Guys, pick up this piece and make it your off-duty staple! This versatile piece can be worn with bermudas or cargo shorts for a weekend getaway to the  beach or woods. You can even style this under a structured blazer and classic denims with an understated belt and casual shoes. Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
